::: {.hero-subsection}


# People


:::
## Principal Investigator


### Pascal Mutz
![](../images/pi.jpg){width=250px}<br>





[Email to Pascal Mutz](mailto:pascal.mutz@gmx.de)

---

## Open positions

We have two open positions! Do you want to join? Klick here: [JOIN US](../join/join.qmd){.btn .btn-primary}
